content: Backend: capacidades por plano + catálogo + require_feature + serialize_user
Backend: perfil editável (avatar base64, nome, bio, phone, country, telegram, webhook)
Backend: Portfolio P&L + Backtest (gated Investidor) + entrega multicanal (email/telegram/webhook)
Frontend: dark mode (tokens .dark + ThemeContext + toggle topbar/Settings)
Frontend: Settings em abas + Markets + Portfolio + AssetInsights (chart/fund/options/backtest) + gating
Frontend: PricingCards features conforme matriz + i18n (4 idiomas)
Testar tudo (backend + frontend) com testing_agent_v3 e corrigir bugs
